div.head: 194. Memorandum From James Cochrane of the National Security Council Staff to the President’s Assistant for National Security Affairs (Brzezinski)Source: Carter Library, National Security Affairs, Brzezinski Material, Country File, Box 29, Iran, 4–10/79. Confidential. Sent for information. A stamped notation reads: “ZB has seen.”

list.head: SUBJECT
list.item: Defense Energy Consumption and the Iranian Response Plan

div.p: During the Interagency Energy Group’s deliberations on reducing US oil consumption by five percent, an options paper on defense energy consumption was developed.Neither a record of the meeting nor the paper has been found. The options were

Last night, Stu Eizenstat was convinced of the merits of the no reduction case. The issue is now dead, an options paper on this subject will not be part of the energy package going to the President.Presumably for the President’s speech; see Document 196.
